message:
feat(messaging): ConsumerActor GenServer wrapping FabricConsumer (8w83i.7.5)

Add ConsumerActor implementing GenServer trait for actor-hosted consumer
delivery engine with region-owned lifecycle:

- ConsumerCall: Pull (with capsule+ticket), Ack, Nack, State query
- ConsumerCast: Pause/Resume with structured tracing
- ConsumerInfo: Heartbeat tick
- ConsumerActorLifecycle: Running/Paused/Stopping state machine
- on_start/on_stop lifecycle hooks with tracing
- All methods async-compatible via Pin<Box<Future>>
- Inner FabricConsumer accessible via consumer()/consumer_mut()

Tests: lifecycle transitions, pause/resume, stopping state, state query,
mutable consumer access. 45 total consumer tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
